title: The PIF Database Briefly Explained
author: The PIF Team
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Document that presents an overview of the Pathogens in Foods (PIF) database, comprising the approach for feeding data to PIF, the type of users and registration steps, example of data extraction and documentation.
steps_raw: Document that presents an overview of the Pathogens in Foods (PIF) database, comprising the approach for feeding data to PIF, the type of users and registration steps, example of data extraction and documentation.
